name: code80-image
description: Generate and edit images through code80 GPT/Grok models or the current Agent.

interface.shortDescription: code80 本地批量生图与图片编辑工作台
interface.longDescription: Inspect local image folders, prepare prompts, generate or edit through code80 GPT/Grok models or the current Agent, add or recover tasks, monitor progress, and preview results. API keys stay on this computer.
defaultPrompt: Open Code80 Image settings and configure a Code80 GPT/Grok model or Codex as my default image model
Inspect a local image folder and prepare a parallel generation batch
